creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Current ports doesn't work under 5-current box, since this
	port uses 'vnconfig' to extract files from a floppy image.
	Using 'mdconfig' if under 5-current will fix this problem.

	VMware is updated to 2.0.4; regenerate MD5 checksum.

Fix: Apply a patch below.
How-To-Repeat: 
	(not relevant to this PR)
